dashboard.quickAccess.title: Quick Actions
dashboard.quickAccess.manuscriptDesc: Jump into the manuscript editor to write and organize.
dashboard.quickAccess.writerDesc: Use the AI Writing Studio to overcome writer's block.
dashboard.quickAccess.outlineDesc: Generate a new plot structure with the AI outliner.
dashboard.quickAccess.charactersDesc: Manage your cast of characters in the dossiers.
dashboard.quickAccess.worldDesc: Build and explore the worlds of your story.
dashboard.quickAccess.exportDesc: Format and download your completed project.
dashboard.details.title: Story Details
dashboard.details.loglinePlaceholder: A one-sentence summary of your story.
dashboard.loglineModal.title: AI Logline Suggestions
dashboard.onboarding.title: Quick tips
dashboard.onboarding.tip1: Use the sidebar to switch between Manuscript, Characters, Worlds, and Export.
dashboard.onboarding.tip2: Add an API key in Settings to unlock cloud AI, or choose Ollama for local models.
dashboard.onboarding.tip3: Your work saves automatically to this device — snapshots are available under Version Control.
dashboard.authorInsights.title: Author pipeline insights
dashboard.authorInsights.readabilityNeed: Write a bit more — readability needs ~40+ words for a stable score.
dashboard.authorInsights.readabilityFoot: Higher scores usually mean easier reading; tune for your genre intentionally.
dashboard.authorInsights.readabilityTool: Flesch reading-ease scale 0–100: higher is easier to read (60–70 is plain English). A rough indicator, not a normative grade.
dashboard.authorInsights.timelineClear: No timeline warnings from scene metadata.
dashboard.authorInsights.timelineWarnBad: {{count}} warnings — refine scene dates/durations on the Scene Board.
dashboard.backup.title: Backup & restore
dashboard.backup.hint: Export your project, import a backup, or open full backup settings.
dashboard.momentum.title: Writing Momentum
dashboard.momentum.noActivity: No writing logged yet — start a session to build your streak.

dashboard.composition.title: Manuscript Composition
dashboard.composition.empty: Add scenes in the Manuscript to see its composition.
